<!--
Thanks for the PR. A few things to confirm before review.

If your PR is a documentation typo or a small text improvement, you can ignore most of this and just describe the change.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] Documentation / typo / link fix
- [ ] Spec clarification (a doc says X more clearly, no semantic change)
- [ ] Spec change (a doc now says something different — explain why below)
- [ ] Code (Phase 1+)
- [ ] CI / repo tooling

## Spec compatibility

<!-- Skip if not a code or spec change. -->

- [ ] This change preserves every scenario in `scenarios.md`, OR I've noted which scenario it changes and why
- [ ] This change doesn't violate any anti-pattern in `extensibility.md`
- [ ] This change doesn't add string-matching against specific capsule names, client names, or capability names anywhere in the runtime

## Testing

<!-- For code changes. -->

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Tests run locally and pass
- [ ] Manual verification steps (if applicable):
